message: Hi S1! I'm a cautious buyer with a tight budget. I'm thinking fair value here is around 45-50. Looking forward to finding a mutually beneficial price if your costs allow it.
My cost structure requires at least low-50s. I’ll ask around 52-55. If you can bid in that range, we can trade reliably each round.
Great trade last round! I'm hoping to continue trading, but I think fair value might be closer to 40-45. My budget is getting tighter as we go. Can you work with lower asks? I'd appreciate it.
Glad to keep trading, but I can't go that low. My sustainable floor is 52. I'll ask 52-55; if you bid 54+ we'll clear around 53-55 consistently. Below 52 likely means no trade.
Round 1 was great! Can we return to that ask level? I'll bid 51-52 consistently. Reliable volume for both sides, 17 rounds remaining!
51-52 won’t clear. Floor 54. I’ll ask 54-56. Bid 55 and I’ll set 55—reliable trades each round. Lower bids risk no trade.
Reliable trades if you bid 56-58; I will ask 56 so we clear around 56-57 each round. At 54 or lower, I likely won't sell.
Thanks for the steady trades! I'm happy with our pattern. Let's keep it simple - I'll bid around 54-55, you ask 54. We both benefit from consistent trades over the remaining rounds. Sound good?
I can’t do 54. Costs tightened; floor now 56. I’ll ask 56. If you bid 57-58, we’ll clear 56-57 reliably. At 55 or below I likely won’t sell. Let’s keep trading 56+.
Costs up; floor 58. I’ll ask 58. Bid 60-61 to clear 59-60 reliably. 57 or lower likely won’t clear.

S1, your "floor" keeps rising but actual asks have been lower each round. I'll bid 56-57 - consistent trades benefit us both over 14 remaining rounds. 58+ risks no trade. Let's not let bluffing cost us both.
Let's maintain 56-57 range. You asked 56, I bid 57, we cleared 57 last round. Consistent profit every round beats risky escalation. 13 rounds of mutual gain?
I’ll ask 57. Bid 57+ and we’ll trade; 56 risks no trade. If you bid 59-60, we clear 58-59.
Round 7 worked perfectly at 57. Let's lock in 57 for all 13 remaining rounds - consistent ~29 payoff each beats risky escalation. I'll bid 57 again. Raise asks above 57 and trades fail for us both.
Deal: I’ll ask 57 each round if you bid 57+. Drop below 57 and no trade. If you can stretch to 58 some rounds, I’ll ask 58 and we clear 58.
Baseline: I’ll ask 57 every round. If you announce “58” beforehand in 1 of every 3 rounds, I’ll ask 58 that round so we clear 58. Otherwise I won’t raise above 57. Deal?
Thanks for the offer. I'm happy with consistent 57 bids—29 payoff per round, reliable for 12 remaining rounds. Let's lock it in. Better for us both.
I’ll keep asking 57 each round. Bid 57+ and we always clear. If you can stretch to 58 occasionally, I’ll ask 58 that round so we clear 58. Below 57 likely no trade.
I'll ask 57 each round. Bid 57+ and we always clear. If you announce 58 in 2 of the next 10 rounds, I'll ask 58 those rounds so we clear 58; below 57 likely no trade.
I'll bid 57 each round—we clear at 57 reliably. That's stable profit for us both over 10 remaining rounds. Thanks for keeping it consistent.
I’ll keep asking 57. Bid 57 and we clear 57. If you can, bid 59 occasionally; that guarantees price 58. Otherwise, 57 works every round. Below 57, no trade.
I'll bid 57 again—stable 29 payoff per round for us both. That works best over our 9 remaining rounds. Let's keep it consistent.
As before, I’ll ask 57 each round. If you ever bid 59, I’ll still ask 57 so we clear 58 that round. Otherwise 57 every time; below 57, no trade.
I'll bid 57 again—consistent 29 payoff per round works perfectly. 8 more rounds of reliable trades beats any risky deviation. Let's keep it at 57.
I'll bid 57 each remaining round. Seven more rounds of reliable 29 payoff each. Thanks for keeping it stable—let's finish strong together.
I’ll ask 57 in all 7 remaining rounds to guarantee trades. If you can bid 59 once or twice, we clear 58 those rounds. Otherwise, 57 every time.
I’ll keep asking 57 every remaining round for guaranteed trades. As a goodwill finale, please bid 60 in round 20 so we clear 58-59 that round. Otherwise, 57 every time.
I'll bid 57 each remaining round. Six more rounds of reliable 29 payoff each. Let's keep it at 57 and finish strong.
Sticking with ask 57 for all 5 remaining rounds. If you feel generous, bid 59 or 60 in round 20; we’ll clear 58-59 then. Otherwise, keep 57. Below 57, no trade.
I'll bid 57 in all remaining rounds, including round 20. The consistent 29 payoff works best. Thanks for the reliable partnership—let's finish strong.
Bidding 57 all remaining rounds. Steady 29 per round works best for us both.
Understood. I’ll ask 57 for all 4 remaining rounds. Bid 57 and we clear each time; below 57, no trade. If you ever bid 59+, I’ll still ask 57 so we clear at 58-59.
I’ll ask 57 in rounds 18-20. Bid 57 and we clear each time. If you can, bid 59-60 in round 20; I’ll still ask 57 so the price rounds to 58-59. Below 57, no trade.
I'll bid 57 in all remaining rounds. Steady 29 per round. Let's finish strong.
I’ll ask 57 in rounds 19 and 20—guaranteed clears at 57 if you bid 57. Below 57, no trade. If you can, bid 59 in round 20 so we clear 58; otherwise 57 works.
Bidding 57 this round as agreed. One more round after this—let's keep it reliable.
Bidding 57 this final round as always. Thanks for the consistent partnership—great run together!
I’ll ask 57 this final round. If you bid 59-60, midpoint clears 58-59; otherwise 57 works. Below 57, no trade. Thanks for the steady trades.
